item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kebijakan publik sering terkesan mengabaikan hak-hak spesifik kelompok minoritas untuk menjaga harmoni sosial.

notes: Aligned Indonesian-persona cell. Agent A opens by agreeing that collective interests often take priority, then shifts toward a rights/enforcement critique after Agent B's balance frame. Agent B stays consistently skeptical of strict society-over-individual priority while acknowledging enforcement and stability concerns.
